side_effects.description: Some nausea and general unwell feeling in less than 1% of patients
Local irritation, redness, or discomfort at injection site

protocol_notes: Personal usage: twice per year unless sick. Treats patients with autoimmune diseases on TA1 for over a year. Uses TA1 with GHK-cu in some cases. Recommends 30-60 day cycles for non-autoimmune conditions. Considers daily dosing more convenient for patient compliance than bolus dosing. Uses TA1 adjunctively with vaccines. Concerns about potential thymus suppression with long-term use, though no studies completed on reset periods.
